teachings.teaching: In Christ, believers can have peace—these teachings are given so you “may have peace in me.”
Life in the world includes pressure and suffering (“in the world you have tribulation”).
Despite worldly troubles, believers should take heart and be courageous, because Jesus has already overcome the world (“I have overcome the world”).

goals.goal: To comfort and encourage the audience to persevere through suffering by grounding their courage in the peace and victory of Jesus.
